overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character standing on a high metal structure overlooking a stormy Gotham City at night. A full moon illuminates the gothic skyline while rain falls and a police helicopter with searchlight flies through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metal walkway overlooking gothic cityscape

events.description: lightning flash briefly illuminates the storm clouds on the left side of the sky

agents.ego_description: Batman stands still on the elevated platform, cape billowing in the wind, surveying the stormy cityscape ahead

entered.detail: large illuminated gothic structure with multiple spires and red accent lighting
large Ferris wheel silhouette visible against the stormy sky
large bright full moon partially obscured by turbulent clouds
ornate metal grated platform with decorative patterns where Batman stands
cluster of dark gothic buildings with scattered illuminated windows
dark turbulent storm clouds covering the night sky with rain falling

segments.scene_description: Batman stands on an elevated metal walkway overlooking a vast gothic cityscape during a stormy night. The full moon looms large in the cloudy sky while distant lightning flashes, illuminating the spires of a massive cathedral and a Ferris wheel in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metal walkway overlooking gothic cityscape with air traffic

events.description: police helicopter enters from the left side of the frame flying toward the center
helicopter passes in front of the full moon with searchlight sweeping across the city below
helicopter exits to the right side of the frame, leaving the scene

agents.ego_description: Batman remains stationary watching the police helicopter fly past with its searchlight scanning the city

notable_agents.action: police helicopter flying from left to right with active searchlight sweeping the city below

segments.scene_description: A police helicopter enters the scene from the left, flying across the stormy sky in front of the full moon. The helicopter's searchlight sweeps across the gothic cityscape as it passes by the cathedral tower and exits to the right, while Batman continues to observe from the platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metal walkway overlooking gothic cityscape

agents.ego_description: Batman stands alone on the platform continuing to survey the stormy city after the helicopter has passed

segments.scene_description: The scene returns to a static view of the stormy gothic cityscape after the helicopter has exited. Batman remains on the elevated walkway as rain continues to fall over the illuminated cathedral and Ferris wheel in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady observation of a stormy gothic cityscape that is momentarily interrupted by the passage of a police helicopter. It begins with Batman standing on an elevated metal walkway, overlooking a vast skyline where a large full moon and flashes of lightning illuminate a distant cathedral and Ferris wheel. As the camera holds its position, a police helicopter enters from the left and flies across the moon, its sweeping searchlight cutting through the rain and casting light over the cathedral tower. The scene then settles back into a quiet, static view as the helicopter exits to the right, leaving the city to the falling rain and the glow of the moon. Batman remains motionless on the platform, continuing his vigil over the illuminated spires of the dark city.
